method: Live job postings from Adzuna, corrected to each metro's real boundary and divided by its local workforce — hiring intensity, not raw size; it measures posting demand, not hires. Full method in METHODOLOGY.md.
caveats: Repost-corrected via the in-sample distinct fraction; a lower bound on distinct demand (multi-site openings can collapse together).
0 of 387 measured metros are below threshold (gray).
